FireRed-OpenStoryline is an AI-powered video editing agent that allows users to direct video creation through natural language conversations. It leverages LLMs for planning and orchestrates various tools to produce professional-quality videos with a focus on user intention and reusable editing styles.

Memex is a browser extension designed to enhance web research and knowledge management. It allows users to bookmark, annotate, highlight, and organize web content with full-text search capabilities across all saved items. The extension aims to streamline the process of recalling and utilizing information found online.

ViniPlay is a self-hosted IPTV player that transforms M3U and EPG files into a modern, high-performance streaming experience. It offers a robust Node.js backend with FFMPEG for stream processing and a responsive frontend for user management, multi-view streaming, and Chromecast support.
